layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: I have been a Special Agent with the Federal Bureau of Investigation ("FBI") since

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 2012. As such, I am a "federal law enforcement officer" within the meaning of Federal Rule of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Criminal Procedure 41(a)(2)(C), that is, a government agent engaged in enforcing the criminal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: laws and duly authorized by the Attorney General to request a search warrant. I have been

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: employed by the FBI for three and a half years, and I am currently assigned to investigate violations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of criminal law relating to the sexual exploitation of children. I have gained expertise in this area

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: through classroom training and daily work related to these types of investigations. As part of my

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: responsibilities, I have been involved in the investigation of sex trafficking cases, and have been

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: involved in search warrants for physical premises.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: I make this Affidavit in support of an application pursuant to Rule 41 of the Federal

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Rules of Criminal Procedure for a second warrant to search the premises specified below (the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: "Subject Premises") for the purpose of seizing the items and information described in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Attachment A. This affidavit is based upon my personal knowledge; my review of documents and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: other evidence; and my conversations with other law enforcement personnel. Because this

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: B. The Subject Premises

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The Target Subject of this investigation is JEFFREY EPSTEIN.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: CONFIDENTIAL

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The Subject Premises are particularly described as a multi-story, single-family

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: residence located at 9 East 71st Street, New York, New York, and include all locked and closed

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: containers found therein. As detailed further herein, the Subject Premises is believed to be owned,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: possessed and controlled by JEFFREY EPSTEIN, a target subject of this investigation. A

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: photograph of the front entrance to the Subject Premises is included below:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: affidavit is being submited for the limited purpose of establishing probable cause, it does not

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: include al the facts that I have learned during the course of my investigation. Where the contents

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: of documents and the actions, statements, and conversations of others are reported herein, they are

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: reported in substance and in part, except where otherwise indicated.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: C. The Target Subject and the Subject Offenses

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: For the reasons detailed below, I believe that there is probable cause to believe that

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the Subject Premises contain evidence, fruits, and instrumentalities of violations of Title 18, United

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The Indictment and Victim-1

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: B. Probable Cause Justifying Search of the Subject Premises

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: II. Probable Cause and the First Warrant

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: As set forth in Exhibit A, from at least in or about 2002, up to and including at least

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in or about 2005, JEFFREY EPSTEIN sexually abused multiple minor girls in the Southern

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: District of New York and elsewhere. During that time and continuing to the present, EPSTEIN

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: possessed and controlled the Subject Premises, which is described in Exhibit A as "the New York

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Residence."

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: As further set forth in paragraphs 8 through 10 of Exhibit A, from at least in or

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: about 2002, up to and including at least in or about 2005, EPSTEIN sexually abused numerous

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: minor victims at the Subject Premises. In particular, and as alleged in the Indictment, when a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: victim arrived at the Subject Premises, she would be escorted to a room inside the Subject Premises

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with a massage table, where she would perform a massage on EPSTEIN.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: States Code, Section 1591 (sex trafficking of minors); and Title 18, United States Code, Section

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 371 (sex trafficking conspiracy) (the "Subject Offenses") by the Target Subject.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: A. Probable Cause Regarding the Target Subject's Commission of the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Subject Offenses

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: On or about July 2, 2019, a grand jury in this District returned an Indictment

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: charging JEFFREY EPSTEIN with the Subject Offenses. A copy of the Indictment is attached

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: hereto as Exhibit A and is incorporated by reference.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Following each encounter, EPSTEIN

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: or one of his employees or associates paid the victim in cash.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: CONFIDENTIAL

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1 In meetings with the Government, Victim-1 has disclosed that, approximately a decade ago, she

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: committed marriage fraud in order to obtain a green card and, subsequently, U.S. citizenship. She

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: has also disclosed personal substance abuse, primarily involving the abuse of prescription drugs,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: during various periods between the early 2000s and 2019. Victim-1 has also disclosed having

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: worked for approximately a year at a "happy-ending" massage parlor, performing paid sex acts.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Victim-1 is currently pursuing a civil damages claim against EPSTEIN for his sexual abuse of her.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Information provided by Victim-1 has proven reliable and has been corroborated by independent

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: evidence, incjuding documents and records obtained during the investigation and the accounts of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: other victims whom Victim-1 has never met.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 10. One of the victims identified in paragraph 22 of Exhibit A is Victim-1. As part of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the FBI's investigation of EPSTEIN, other law enforcement officers have interviewed Victim-1.1

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: I know from my conversations with other law enforcement officers who have interviewed Victim-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1, that Victim-1 has provided the following information, in substance and in part:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: b. During that same period, Victim-1 observed multiple floors of the Subject Premises

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and numerous individual rooms within the Subject Premises. Victim-1 has provided detailed

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: a. Between approximately 2002 and 2005, EPSTEIN sexually abused Victim-1 on

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: multiple occasions in the Subject Premises. This sexual abuse all occurred when Victim-1 was

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: under the age of 18.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: As set forth in paragraphs 12 through 13 of Exhibit A, to further facilitate his ability

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to abuse minor girls in New York, JEFFREY EPSTEIN asked and enticed certain of his victims to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: recruit additional minor girls to perform "massages" and similarly engage in sex acts with

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: EPSTEIN. When a victim would recruit another minor girl for EPSTEIN, he paid both the victim-

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: recruiter and the new victim hundreds of dollars in cash. EPSTEIN knew that his victims were

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: underage, including because certain victims told him their age.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The July 6. 2019 Search Warrant of the Subject Premises

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: f. Victim-1 has not been in the Subject Premises since approximately 2005.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: CONFIDENTIAL

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 12. At approximately 6 p.m. on or about July 6, 2019, law enforcement officers (the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: "Search Team") commenced executing the search warrant at the Subject Premises; I joined the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Search Team thereafter. While inside the Subject Premises, I observed the following, among other

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: things:

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: d. In addition, Victim-1 recalled observing what appeared to be a taxidermied dog in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: a living space in the Subject Premises.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: descriptions of certain aspects of the interior of the Subject Premises, including Victim-1's

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: memory of specific details regarding the layout, furnishings, decorations, and floor pattern of

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: various areas within the Subject Premises.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: c. In particular, Victim-1 observed that a bathroom in the residence contained what

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: appeared to be a bust of a human torso (the "Torso"). Victim-1 believed that the Torso was

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: possibly a type of sex toy.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: e. Victim-1 recalled that EPSTEIN typically abused her in a room she described as a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: "massage room," (the "Massage Room"), which contained a massage table, and was decorated

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with artwork depicting naked women, hung on walls that appeared to be adorned with fabric.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 11. On or about July 6, 2019, the Honorable Barbara Moses, United States Magistrate

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Judge, signed a search warrant authorizing a search of the Subject Premises. The search warrant

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: is attached as Exhibit B and incorporated by reference herein.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: a.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Inside a closet within the entryway to a bathroom in the Subject Premises, I

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: observed what appear to be two busts of female human torsos, from their upper pelvis to the neck.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: In addition, inside the bathroom, I observed a third bust, which appears to depict a female body

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: CONFIDENTIAL

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: d.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Inside the Subject Premises, in what appears to be EPSTEIN's office, on or about

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the second floor of the Subject Premises, I observed what appears to be a taxidermied dog (the

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: "Dog"). Based on my conversations with law enforcement officers who have interviewed

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: from the ribcage to the clavicle (collectively, (the "Busts"). The Busts do not appear to be designed

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: for use as sex toys, and appear instead to be artwork. Nevertheless, based on my conversations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with law enforcement officers who have interviewed Victim-1, I have learned that the Busts appear

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: to be generally consistent with Victim-1's description of observing the Torso in EPSTEIN's

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: bathroom in the Subject Premises. Accordingly, there is probable cause to believe that the Busts

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: are corroborating evidence of Victim-1's description of the Subject Premises.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: C.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Inside the Subject Premises, inside a closet adjacent to a bathroom, I observed a

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: shelf that appears to contain several black binders, with labels on the spine of each binder. In

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: particular, one of the binders is marked with a series of labels, one of which reads: "PB Girls."

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Given that the Indictment charges EPSTEIN with participating in a conspiracy to engage in sex

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: trafficking of minor girls in both Palm Beach, Florida and New York, I believe that "PB Girls"

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: may refer to minor victims in Palm Beach, Florida.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: b.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Inside the Subject Premises, I observed a room that, based on my conversations

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with law enforcement officers who have interviewed Victim-1, appears to be consistent with

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Victim-1's descriptions of the Massage Room. The room contained a table covered with a sheet,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: and appears to be a massage table. The walls appear to be covered in a type of felt-like tapestry

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: fabric. I further observed two paintings and three photographs hanging on the walls of the Massage

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Room. The paintings and photographs depict nude females. One of the photographs appears to

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: depict a nude girl. Based on my training and experience investigating crimes involving the sexual

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: exploitation of children, the girl appears to be approximately 15 to 20 years old.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: III. Conclusion and Ancillary Provisions

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: CONFIDENTIAL

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Victim-1, the Dog appears to be consistent with Victim-1's description of observing a taxidermied

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: dog in the Subject Premises.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: e.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Inside the Subject Premises, I observed in plain view several sheets of stationary,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: with letterhead marked "Jeffrey Epstein."

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 13. After observing the foregoing items, the Search Team stopped the search and froze

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: the scene in order to seek a new search warrant.

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 15. The Search Team is currently at the Subject Premises, securing the location, and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: would anticipate executing the requested search warrant immediately. However, given the late

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: hour, it is anticipated that the Search Team would commence executing the search warrant after

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 14. Based on the foregoing, given that several items described by Victim-1 as being

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: present in the Subject Premises in 2005 appear to be currently in the Subject Premises,

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: I respectfully submit there is probable cause to believe that evidence of the Subject Offenses, and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: in particular the items described in Attachment A, will be located within the Subject Premises and

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: therefore request the court to issue a warrant to seize the items and information specified in

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: Attachment A to this affidavit and to the Search and Seizure Warrant.

layout_dets.text: 1. As set forth herein, over the course of many

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: The premises to be searched (the "Subject Premises") are described as a nearly

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: New York, and include all locked and closed containers found therein. A photograph of the firont

layout_dets.label: ocr_text

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: 1. This warrant authorizes executing agents to photograph, video record and otherwise

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: document the full interior of the Subject Premises, including any items, furnishings, or possessions

layout_dets.label: ocr_text
layout_dets.text: therein.

layout_dets.text: instrumentalities of violations of Title 18, United States Code, Sections 1591 (sex trafficking of
